executive_summary: Governance Committee Minutes Review of Northwind Contract: 3 risk(s), 0 gap(s) and 5 mitigation action(s) identified. Top risk: Potential delay in contract approval due to insufficient liability, transfer mechanism, and incident-notification language
key_highlights: Potential delay in contract approval due to insufficient liability, transfer mechanism, and incident-notification language
Access-review evidence gap must be corrected before launch close-out
Temporary uptime risk acceptance for pilot phase subject to compensating controls and monthly reporting
Negotiate liability cap with vendor legal
Draft SCC Appendix for data residency
